SAM.gov Contract Opportunities

Solicitation: 155mm Towed Howitzer Systems

Notice ID: W912-2026-R-0155 | Agency: Department of the Army | Country: USA

The U.S. Army intends to procure 24 units of a 155mm towed howitzer (light field gun class). Estimated value is $240 million. Responses are due by July 30, 2026.

This is a full and open competition. Requirements include a maximum range of not less than 30 km and air-transportability. Interested parties should respond via SAM.gov.

Key requirement summary
ParameterValue
System155mm towed howitzer
Quantity24 units
Range>= 30 km
